project.name: Daily
project.stack: Tauri v2 + React 19 + TypeScript 6 + Zustand 5 + Rust 2021

modules.name: Note Categories & Tags
modules.description: Add a tagging system to notes with category grouping. Notes gain a 'tags' array and optional 'category' field. The UI gets tag chips inline in NoteEditor, a tag cloud/filter sidebar in NoteList, and persist to SQLite for efficient querying.
dataModels: Tag { id: string; name: string; color?: string; }
Note extended: + tags: string[] (tag IDs), + category: string | null, + archived: boolean
NoteTag { note_id: string; tag_id: string; } — SQLite junction table

modules.name: Markdown Rendering
modules.description: Add a Markdown preview/edit toggle to NoteEditor. Use a Rust markdown parser (pulldown-cmark) to render HTML. The frontend renders the HTML in a preview pane with syntax highlighting for code blocks via highlight.js.
dataModels: EditorMode: 'edit' | 'preview' | 'split'

modules.name: Note Export
modules.description: Allow users to export notes individually or in bulk as plain text (.txt) or Markdown (.md). Use Tauri's file dialog plugin for save-as dialogs. Support per-note export from the note menu, batch export from NoteList, and export with metadata (created_at, tags as YAML frontmatter).
dataModels: ExportFormat: 'txt' | 'md'
ExportOptions { format: ExportFormat; include_metadata: boolean; note_ids?: string[] }

modules.name: Note Pinning & Archive
modules.description: Extend note lifecycle: pin important notes to top of list, archive old notes to a separate view, soft-delete with 7-day trash. Add configurable auto-archive for notes not edited in N days.
dataModels: Note extended: + archived: bool, + deleted_at: u64 | null, + pinned (existing, used for UI sort)
AppSettings extended: + archive_days: u32 (default 30)

modify: src-tauri/src/db/notes.rs (add archived, deleted_at fields; soft-delete logic)

modules.name: Clipboard Monitor Backend
modules.description: Rust-side clipboard watcher using arboard crate. Monitors system clipboard on a background thread, hashes content for dedup, stores entries in SQLite. Emits events to the frontend via Tauri events. Respects max-history size and ignored-apps list.
dataModels: ClipboardEntry { id: string; content: string; content_type: 'text'|'image'|'html'|'rtf'; content_hash: string; thumbnail_path: string|null; created_at: u64; starred: bool; source_app: string|null }
AppSettings extended: + clipboard_enabled: bool, + clipboard_max_entries: u32 (default 500), + clipboard_ignored_apps: Vec<String>

modify: src-tauri/src/lib.rs (manage ClipboardStore, register commands, start watcher)

modules.name: Clipboard History UI
modules.description: Frontend UI for clipboard history. New 'Clipboard' tab showing scrollable list with text preview, type icon, timestamp, star. Click to copy back to system clipboard. Search/filter. Starred section. Image preview in detail view.
dataModels: Tab extended: 'clipboard'

modules.name: Global Search Overlay
modules.description: Unified search overlay (Ctrl+F) querying notes and clipboard simultaneously via a single Rust command. Grouped virtual list with keyboard navigation. Appears as floating panel within the sidebar, replacing per-module search fields.
dataModels: SearchResult { id: string; source: 'note'|'clipboard'; title: string; snippet: string; score: number; timestamp: u64; }
SearchQuery { text: string; sources: ('note'|'clipboard')[]; }

modules.name: Drag & Drop Reordering
modules.description: Add drag-and-drop reorder to NoteList and ClipboardList using @dnd-kit. Persistent sort_order in backend. Keyboard-accessible reordering (Alt+Up/Down). Batch-update command for sync.
dataModels: Note extended: + sort_order: u32
ClipboardEntry extended: + sort_order: u32 (starred section only)

modules.name: UI Polish & Custom Themes
modules.description: Comprehensive UI refresh: CSS transitions/animations (slide-in, crossfade, scale+fade for list items), collapsible sections, custom accent color picker, screenshot preview in clipboard detail, refined acrylic blending.
dataModels: AppSettings extended: + accent_color: string (hex, default '#4F8CFF'), + animations_enabled: bool (default true)

modify: src/styles/components.css (animation keyframes, collapsible, image preview area)

modules.name: Testing Infrastructure
modules.description: Set up Vitest for React/store unit tests, Rust #[cfg(test)] for backend, WebDriverIO for E2E. Add test CI job to GitHub Actions. Target 80%+ coverage on core logic.

modules.name: Internationalization (i18n)
modules.description: Add i18next + react-i18next with namespace lazy loading. Externalize all UI strings into en-US and zh-CN locale JSON files. Auto-detect system language with manual override in settings.
dataModels: AppSettings extended: + language: string (default 'auto')

modules.name: Build & Code Signing
modules.description: Productionize builds: Windows code signing via GitHub Secrets, MSI/NSIS installers, auto-updater with tauri-plugin-updater. Publish workflow triggered by version tags building signed artifacts.
dataModels: tauri.conf.json bundle.windows.wix
tauri.conf.json bundle.windows.nsis
tauri.conf.json plugins.updater endpoints

modules.name: Cross-Platform Support
modules.description: Audit and fix platform-specific code for macOS and Linux. macOS: NSVisualEffectView, Meta+Space shortcut, menubar handling. Linux: GTK transparency, X11/Wayland clipboard, tray icon DE compatibility.
dataModels: Platform: 'windows' | 'macos' | 'linux'

modules.name: Data Import/Export & Backup
modules.description: Full data portability: export all data as .dailybackup ZIP archive. Import with conflict resolution. Scheduled auto-backup. Factory reset with confirmation. Backup integrity verification via checksums.
dataModels: BackupManifest { version: string; created_at: u64; checksum: string; contents: { notes_count: u32; clipboard_count: u32 } }
AppSettings extended: + backup_enabled: bool, + backup_dir: string, + backup_interval_days: u32

modules.name: Diagnostics & Error Reporting
modules.description: Diagnostics subsystem: log viewer panel (filterable by level), React error boundary with recovery UI, Rust panic hook with crash dumps, 'Report Issue' button that collects logs + system info into a pre-formatted GitHub issue.
dataModels: LogEntry { timestamp: u64; level: string; message: string; source: string }
SystemInfo { os: string; os_version: string; app_version: string; tauri_version: string; arch: string }
IssueReport { system_info: SystemInfo; logs: LogEntry[]; user_description: string }

rust_backend.migrate_to_sqlite: The current JSON-file persistence (notes.json, settings.json) works for v0.1.0 but will not scale to clipboard (500+ entries) or tag queries. Migrate to SQLite (rusqlite + migrations) early — ideally Module 1. Keep settings.json as flat file for bootstrapping simplicity.
rust_backend.state_pattern: Continue the existing `manage(...)` + `State<T>` pattern. Do not use global statics or lazy_static.
rust_backend.clipboard_threading: Clipboard watcher on a dedicated std::thread, polling arboard at 500ms intervals. Cross-platform clipboard events are unreliable. Use Arc<AtomicBool> for graceful shutdown.
rust_backend.error_propagation: Commands return Result<T, String>. For Module 10+, introduce thiserror enum. Avoid .unwrap() in production paths.
rust_backend.permissions: Every new Tauri plugin (dialog, clipboard-manager, updater, fs) must be registered in capabilities/default.json. Missing permissions are the #1 silent-failure cause in production.
rust_backend.migration_path: When moving notes to SQLite, do not delete the JSON path immediately. Add a startup migration that reads JSON → writes SQLite on first launch, then switches.
rust_backend.migrations: Use a simple version table in SQLite. Each schema-extending module adds a migration function. Run all pending migrations at startup before any queries.

react_frontend.zustand_slices: As the store grows, split into Zustand slices: notesStore.ts, clipboardStore.ts, searchStore.ts. Combine in appStore.ts. Avoid a single 500+ line store.
react_frontend.component_colocation: Module components in their own directories. Share common primitives in components/ui/ (Button, Input, Modal, Tooltip, Spinner).
react_frontend.virtual_lists: Clipboard history can reach 500+ entries. Use @tanstack/react-virtual for lists. Do not render hundreds of DOM nodes.
react_frontend.keyboard_navigation: Every list (notes, clipboard, search) must support Arrow Up/Down, Enter, Escape. Use a reusable useListNavigation hook. Non-negotiable for a power-user tool.
react_frontend.animation_performance: Use CSS transform and opacity for animations (GPU-composited). Avoid animating height/width. Use FLIP technique for list reordering.
react_frontend.theme_system: Extend CSS custom properties: --accent, --accent-hover, --border, --surface-elevated. ThemePicker writes to document.documentElement.style.setProperty at runtime.
react_frontend.i18n_constraints: Use namespace scoping: t('notes:save'). Never concatenate translated strings — use {{variable}} interpolation. Keep locale JSON flat (max 2 levels).

pitfalls.windows_acrylic_transitions: CSS transitions on the transparent acrylic window can cause black flashes (DWM compositor bugs). Test all animations with acrylic enabled. Fall back to instant transitions if flickering is reproducible.
pitfalls.clipboard_images: Store clipboard images as files on disk (not base64 in SQLite) to keep DB manageable. Use data_dir/images/. Generate thumbnails (max 200px). Clean up orphans on exit.
pitfalls.shortcut_conflicts: Alt+Space is taken by PowerToys Run on many Windows machines. Provide clear UX to change the shortcut. Detect conflicts at runtime if possible.
pitfalls.tauri_v2_plugins: Pin plugin versions in Cargo.toml (=2, not ^2). Test upgrades before bumping.
pitfalls.sqlite_concurrency: SQLite WAL mode: concurrent reads, single writer. Clipboard monitor writes on every clipboard change. If user saves a note simultaneously → SQLITE_BUSY. Use retry loop with exponential backoff (3 retries: 50ms/250ms/1250ms) or a write queue.
pitfalls.macos_codesign: macOS notarization requires Apple Developer account ($99/year). Hardened runtime entitlements for plugins (com.apple.security.cs.disable-library-validation). Make optional in docs.

testing_strategy.unit: Vitest for stores and pure components. Test each Zustand action in isolation. Mock IPC at bridge layer. Rust: #[cfg(test)] for db, settings, clipboard hashing.
testing_strategy.integration: @testing-library/react for full component trees. NoteEditor → save → NoteList update cycle. Mock only the IPC bridge.
testing_strategy.e2e: WebDriverIO with Tauri WebDriver support. Critical paths: launch → create note → edit → search → delete. Clipboard tests need real system clipboard → mark @skipci, run locally only.
testing_strategy.ci: Test job in ci.yml PR workflow. E2E on ubuntu-latest (headless). Windows E2E is complex → self-hosted runner or skip initially.

release_cadence.v0.2.0: Modules 1-4. 3-4 weeks. Biggest user-facing value add. Ship before clipboard.
release_cadence.v0.3.0: Modules 5-6. 2-3 weeks. Clipboard is self-contained but the monitor thread is the riskiest piece.
release_cadence.v0.4.0: Modules 7-9. 3-4 weeks. Ship search (7) first, then DnD (8), then polish (9). Can be patch versions.
release_cadence.v0.5.0: Modules 10-12. 2-3 weeks. Testing and i18n are parallelizable. Code signing can trail by a patch if certs aren't ready.
release_cadence.v0.6.0: Modules 13-15. 4-6 weeks. Cross-platform testing needs real hardware. Diagnostics ships last.
